The '''crystal barnacle''' was a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Barnacle/Legends|barnacle]] that clung to [[Starship/Legends|starships]] in [[Drydock/Legends|drydocks]] on [[Bilbringi VII]], a large chunk of [[Ore/Legends|ore]] in the [[Bilbringi system/Legends|Bilbringi system]]. The species had a spike-covered body with three pairs of [[Limb/Legends|legs]].<ref name="TEGtPaM" />

==Behind the scenes==
Crystal barnacles were mentioned in ''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]''.<ref name="TEGtPaM" />
